stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Which of the following statements is true referring to the figure?

options.a: Turning into a magnetic heading of 030°, the magnetic bearing from the beacon will be 030°
options.b: Maintaining a magnetic heading of 120°, the magnetic bearing from the beacon is 030°
options.c: Turning into a magnetic heading of 030°, the magnetic bearing to the beacon will be 210°
options.d: Maintaining a magnetic heading of 120°, the magnetic bearing to the beacon is 030°
